atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain began approximately four days ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as primarily on the inside of the elbow

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates the pain as 6/10

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The pain is exacerbated by wrist flexion

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The pain is exacerbated by resisted wrist extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The pain keeps him from lifting and doing activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma or injury to the elbow

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals moderate tenderness to palpation over the medial epicondyle of the right elbow

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited by pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Wrist pronation and supination elicit pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Radiographs of the right elbow demonstrate no fracture or bony abnormality

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with medial epicondylitis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg every 6 hours with food for one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a sling to be worn at all times while awake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to apply ice to the elbow three times daily for 20 minutes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to see the patient again in one week to assess progress.
